info.debugWarning: High volume: Debug and Silly levels may generate many messages

help.title: ioBroker Live Log Subscription
help.description: ioBroker live log subscription via WebSocket. Receives log messages in real-time as they occur.
help.logLevelDescription: Minimum log level to receive (higher levels are included)
help.outputPropertyDescription: Message property where log data will be placed (default: payload)
help.includeTimestampDescription: Add formatted timestamp to output message
help.includeSourceDescription: Add source adapter information to output message
logLevelsList: Debug: Debug messages and above (high volume)
Info: Information messages and above (medium volume)
Warning: Warning and error messages (low volume)
useCasesList: Error Monitoring: Set level to "Error" to catch critical issues
System Monitoring: Use "Info" level for general system activity
Development: Use "Debug" or "Silly" for detailed troubleshooting
Alerting: Filter by source adapter and send notifications
